productName: Trichome Extracts Infused Pre-roll Bubble Bath#1 - 1g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Bubble Bath#1, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of ammonia, lavender, and rose, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
